title: Aizodraba aizoides

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported health benefits, including the treatment of inflammatory conditions, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Aizoon aizoides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. Aizoon aizoides is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin care.
